data.body:
looks like we need custom parsing between Claude and Codex - Claude now works correctly thanks to a recent commit.

Now Codex shows "codex-cli" instead of the version "5.4"

let's make sure that both

Claude | Opus | 4.6 

and

Codex | GPT | 5.4

are parsed and rendered properly
data.title: Active View: codex gpt 5.4 needs better parsing
